message:
feat(inheritance): infer joined inheritance and improve schema DDL

- Joined inheritance is now inferred for #[sqlmodel(table, inherits="...")]
  without requiring explicit inheritance="joined" attribute
- SchemaBuilder emits ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN for STI child-specific
  columns (since they share the parent's physical table)
- Joined inheritance FK constraints now handle composite primary keys
  correctly by iterating all PK columns
- Improved DDL comment clarity for STI child table skipping

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
